app.name: StepSprint
app.tagline: Track steps. Compete with your team. Build habits that stick.

hint.login: Enter your email and password to sign in.
hint.register: Create an account to join a step challenge.
hint.setup: Your account was created before passwords were required. Please set a password to continue.

links.toRegister: Don't have an account? Sign up
links.toLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. you@example.com).
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordNeedsLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
errors.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
errors.emailNotVerified: Verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox for a link from StepSprint (and spam).

afterRegister.title: Check your email
afterRegister.resendPrompt: No message yet? Try resending the verification email.

verifyEmailActions.resendDone: If this address has an account that still needs verifying, another email has been sent.

verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.success: Your email is verified. You can sign in.
verifyEmail.failed: This link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.invalidLink: This verification link is missing details. Ask for a new link from sign in.

home.title: Participant Home
home.welcome: Welcome back! You've signed in successfully.
home.notEnrolled: You are not enrolled in this challenge yet.
home.emptyState: No summary yet. Submit your first steps to get started!

notifications.dailyReminder: Remind me to log steps (Web Push when enabled, plus email when the server has email configured)
notifications.enabled: Push reminders enabled on this device.

submit.title: Submit steps
submit.noChallengeSelected: Choose an active challenge before submitting steps.

weeklyLeaderboard.title: Weekly Top Steppers
weeklyLeaderboard.noChallengeSelected: Select a challenge to view the leaderboard.
weeklyLeaderboard.noEntries: No entries yet for this week.

weekPicker.pickDate: Pick a date to select its week

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.hint: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent. Check your email (or server console in dev mode).

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

resetPassword.invalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid or incomplete.
resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.needsLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
errors.needsNumber: Password must contain at least one number.

invite.title: Accepting invite
invite.alreadyHaveAccountHint: If you already had an account, your session stays active. Others can finish signing up from the Login page.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The app hit an unexpected error. You can try again, or reload the page if the problem persists.

admin.title: Admin console
admin.noAccess: You do not have admin access.

invite.hintExpiry: The link expires in 7 days. The participant opens it to join and sign in.
invite.clipboardUnavailable: Copy failed. Select the URL and copy it manually.

analytics.trendAria: Bar chart of submission counts per day
analytics.emptyTrend: No submissions yet on this timeline.
analytics.selectChallenge: Select a challenge to view analytics.

cohort.intro: Benchmark engagement across every challenge (sorted by start date).
cohort.empty: No challenges yet. Create one to see cohort metrics.

exports.hint: CSV exports open against the StepSprint API host. Stay logged in; your browser sends your session cookie to the API origin.
exports.selectChallengeFirstLink: Select a challenge above to enable export links.

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this submission? ({{user}} · {{date}} · {{steps}} steps) This cannot be undone.

feedback.inviteCreated: Invite link created. Share it with the participant.
feedback.selectChallengeAndEmail: Select a challenge and enter email.

teamStandings.title: Team Leaderboard
teamStandings.emptyAdmin: No team standings yet. Add participants and assign teams to get started.
teamStandings.emptyParticipant: No team standings yet. Log steps to contribute, or ask your admin to assign teams.
